name: reporter: $CLAUDE_TDD_PRO_LANG=es selects Spanish-localized message templates when defined in rule.meta.messages.<id>.es
command: CLAUDE_TDD_PRO_LANG=es bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rule-engine/cli.sh" --rule msgid-localized --in "$PWD/file.js" --report-format json 2>out.json && grep -E '"message":"evita eval"' out.json 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
